arabic_text: وَمَنْ تَقَرَّبَ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ بِخَصْلَةٍ مِنْ خِصَالِ الْخَيْرِ كَانَ كَمَنْ أَدَّى فَرِيضَةً فِيمَا سِوَاهُ، وَمَنْ أَدَّى فِيهِ فَرِيضَةً كَانَ كَمَنْ أَدَّى سَبْعِينَ فَرِيضَةً فِيمَا سِوَاهُ، وَ
alt_text: Arabic hadith about Ramadan: 'Whoever draws near in the month of Ramadan with a quality of goodness is like one who fulfilled an obligatory act in any other month; and whoever fulfills an obligatory act in it is like one who fulfilled seventy obligatory acts in any other month…' Well-known Ramadan hadith.
notes: Famous hadith on the multiplied reward of Ramadan; traditionally attributed to the Prophet via Salman al-Farsi.
